productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Cress 3s3 4 Pan White Capris
description: Composition White capris made of 100% polyster with an inner mesh lining, handy side pockets, adidas' signature three stripes running down the sides in navy blue, comfortable elastic waist band with inner drawstring, brand name and logo embroidered on the left leg, and drawstrings at the ends of both legs Fitting Regular Washcare Machine wash in cold water below 30 Degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on prints/trims/logo If you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these white capri pants from adidas belong in your wardrobe. The stripes on the sides add instant spunk to the pants. The side pockets are spacious enough for everything from your wallet to iPod. The fabric is breathable, and the waist band is soft for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Engineered with ClimaLite technology, the capris draw sweat away from the skin to keep you dry and comfortable at all times. Team it up with a cool t-shirt and an excellent pair of shoes to hit the road. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
